member.name: T:ResilientMqtt.Buffering.InMemoryOfflineBuffer
member.summary: In-memory FIFO buffer with drop-oldest overflow policy.

member.name: T:ResilientMqtt.Internal.ICircuitBreaker
member.summary: Internal circuit breaker abstraction so it can be disabled via NullCircuitBreaker.

member.name: T:ResilientMqtt.Internal.NullCircuitBreaker
member.summary: Always-allow stub used when the feature is disabled.

member.name: T:ResilientMqtt.Internal.CircuitBreaker
member.summary: Thread-safe circuit breaker.

member.name: T:ResilientMqtt.Internal.ExponentialBackoffStrategy
member.summary: Exponential backoff with optional jitter. Jitter prevents synchronized reconnect storms across many clients.

member.name: T:ResilientMqtt.Internal.IdleAwareHealthCheck
member.summary: Timer-based health monitor. Pings broker on idle channels.

member.name: T:ResilientMqtt.Internal.NullHealthCheck
member.summary: No-op health check used when is false. All operations are silent no-ops; no timer is started, no pings are sent.

member.name: T:ResilientMqtt.Internal.IRetryStrategy
member.summary: Pluggable retry delay strategy.

member.name: T:ResilientMqtt.Internal.IHealthCheck
member.summary: Pluggable connection health monitor.

member.name: T:ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttConnectionState
member.summary: Lifecycle status of the underlying connection.

member.name: T:ResilientMqtt.IResilientMqttMessageHandler
member.summary: Inbound message handler contract.

member.name: T:ResilientMqtt.IResilientMqttClient
member.summary: Public MQTT client contract. Inject this into your services via DI.

remarks.para:
When is set (e.g. "branches/B001/T006"), the prefix is applied differently to publish vs subscribe:
PublishAsync — prefix is applied by default (set useTopicPrefix: false to publish to an absolute topic).
SubscribeAsync — prefix is NOT applied by default (set useTopicPrefix: true to listen for prefixed topics, e.g. responses to your own publishes). This default lets you subscribe to cross-tenant topics like "server/broadcasts/#" without surprises.

member.name: E:ResilientMqtt.IResilientMqttClient.OnConnected
E:ResilientMqtt.IResilientMqttClient.OnDisconnected
member.summary: Fires when the connection drops (before reconnect attempts begin). Handlers run sequentially and are awaited. Use for cleanup, alerting, or UI state updates.

member.name: M:ResilientMqtt.IResilientMqttClient.PublishAsync``1(System.String,``0,System.Boolean,ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttQos,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Publish a typed payload (auto JSON serialization).
member.param: true (default) → prepend . false → use verbatim (absolute topic).

member.name: M:ResilientMqtt.IResilientMqttClient.PublishRawAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttQos,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Publish a raw string payload.

member.name: M:ResilientMqtt.IResilientMqttClient.PublishBytesAsync(System.String,System.Byte[],System.Boolean,ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttQos,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Publish raw bytes (binary).

member.name: M:ResilientMqtt.IResilientMqttClient.SubscribeAsync(System.String,ResilientMqtt.IResilientMqttMessageHandler,ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttQos,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Subscribe with a typed handler. Auto-resubscribes on reconnect.
member.param: false (default) → use verbatim. true → prepend (useful when subscribing to responses meant for this client only).

member.name: M:ResilientMqtt.IResilientMqttClient.SubscribeAsync(System.String,System.Func{System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task},ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttQos,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Subscribe with an inline delegate.

member.name: M:ResilientMqtt.IResilientMqttClient.UnsubscribeAsync(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Unsubscribe a topic pattern. Must match how it was subscribed.

member.name: T:ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttHostedService
member.summary: Optional hosted service that connects on app start and disconnects on stop. Register with builder.AddAutoStart() or manually via services.AddHostedService<MqttHostedService>().

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttOptions.Host
member.summary: Broker hostname or IP. Required.

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttOptions.Port
member.summary: Broker TCP port. 1883 (plain) or 8883 (TLS).

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttOptions.Username
member.summary: Broker username. Empty = anonymous.

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttOptions.Password
member.summary: Broker password. Empty = anonymous.

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttOptions.ClientId
member.summary: Unique client identifier. MUST be unique per running instance — MQTT spec disconnects existing client when a duplicate connects.

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttOptions.TopicPrefix
member.summary: Optional prefix for all published topics. Example: "branches/B001" → PublishAsync("status") sends to "branches/B001/status". Empty = no prefix.

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttOptions.CleanSession
member.summary: false → broker retains subscriptions + QoS1/2 messages across reconnects (recommended for banking). true → clean slate every connect.

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttOptions.KeepAliveSeconds
member.summary: Keep-alive interval (seconds). Default 30.

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttOptions.LastWill
member.summary: Last Will & Testament — broker publishes OFFLINE if we disconnect ungracefully.

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttOptions.OfflineBuffer
member.summary: Offline message buffer — queues publishes when broker is unreachable.

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttOptions.CircuitBreaker
member.summary: Circuit breaker — short-circuits publishes after repeated failures.

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttOptions.HealthCheck
member.summary: Idle-aware health check — pings broker on quiet channels.

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttOptions.Reconnect
member.summary: Reconnect strategy with exponential backoff + jitter.

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.TlsOptions.Enabled
member.summary: Enable TLS.

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.TlsOptions.Mode
member.summary: "None" → default OS certificate validation "Normal" → accept any certificate (dev / internal LAN) "Hard" → pin certificate thumbprint (production)

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.TlsOptions.TrustedThumbprint
member.summary: SHA1/SHA256 thumbprint when Mode = "Hard".

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.LastWillOptions.Enabled
member.summary: Enable broker-side LWT. Disable for fire-and-forget scenarios.

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.LastWillOptions.Topic
member.summary: Sub-topic (prefixed automatically). Example: "status".

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.LastWillOptions.OnlinePayload
member.summary: Payload published at successful connect.

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.LastWillOptions.OfflinePayload
member.summary: Payload broker will publish on unexpected disconnect, and we publish on graceful shutdown.

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.LastWillOptions.Retain
member.summary: Retain the status message so new subscribers see current state.

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.OfflineBufferOptions.Enabled
member.summary: Buffer publishes when disconnected? false = drop on disconnect.

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.OfflineBufferOptions.MaxSize
member.summary: Maximum messages held in memory. Oldest dropped on overflow.

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.OfflineBufferOptions.DrainPauseMs
member.summary: Delay between drained messages (ms) — prevents broker flood after reconnect.

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.CircuitBreakerOptions.Enabled
member.summary: Enable circuit breaker on publish path.

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.CircuitBreakerOptions.FailureThreshold
member.summary: Consecutive failures before opening the circuit.

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.CircuitBreakerOptions.ResetMinutes
member.summary: Minutes before transitioning Open → HalfOpen.

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.HealthCheckOptions.Enabled
member.summary: Enable idle-aware ping check.

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.HealthCheckOptions.IntervalMinutes
member.summary: Tick interval (minutes).

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.HealthCheckOptions.IdleThresholdMinutes
member.summary: Channel idle threshold (minutes) before triggering a ping.

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.ReconnectOptions.Enabled
member.summary: Enable automatic reconnect on disconnect.

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.ReconnectOptions.BaseDelaySeconds
member.summary: Initial delay (seconds) for backoff.

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.ReconnectOptions.MaxDelaySeconds
member.summary: Maximum delay (seconds) for backoff.

member.name: P:ResilientMqtt.ReconnectOptions.UseJitter
member.summary: Apply random jitter to prevent thundering-herd reconnects.

member.name: T:ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttBuilder
member.summary: Fluent builder returned by AddResilientMqtt(). Lets the host app override options, swap the offline buffer, or hook events.

member.name: M:ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttBuilder.Configure(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Bind options from an section.

member.name: M:ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttBuilder.Configure(System.Action{ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttOptions})
member.summary: Override options in code (additive — runs after Configure).

member.name: M:ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttBuilder.ConfigureFromDependency``1(System.Action{ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttOptions,``0})
member.summary: Cross-bind options from another options object (e.g. derive ClientId from an app-level config). Runs after Configure.

member.name: M:ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttBuilder.UseOfflineBuffer``1
member.summary: Replace the default in-memory offline buffer (e.g. with a SQLite-backed one).

member.name: M:ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttBuilder.UseOfflineBuffer(ResilientMqtt.Buffering.IOfflineBuffer)
member.summary: Provide a buffer instance directly.

member.name: M:ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttBuilder.ValidateOnStart
member.summary: Validate options at host startup. Recommended.

member.name: T:ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttServiceCollectionExtensions
M:ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttServiceCollectionExtensions.AddResilientMqtt(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Add with configuration section binding.

member.name: M:ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttServiceCollectionExtensions.AddResilientMqtt(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttOptions})
member.summary: Add with code-based configuration.

member.name: M:ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttServiceCollectionExtensions.AddAutoStart(ResilientMqtt.ResilientMqttBuilder)
member.summary: Convenience: register a hosted service that automatically connects on app start and gracefully disconnects on app stop.
